culture.label: Culture
culture.description: History, communities, and social forces that shaped ZK.
culture.query: PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX ch: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/zk-lab/vocab/chapter#> SELECT ?node ?label ?description WHERE { ?node skos:inScheme ch:Culture ; rdfs:label ?label . OPTIONAL { ?node dcterms:description ?description } } ORDER BY ?label

abstractions.label: Abstractions
abstractions.query: PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX ch: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/zk-lab/vocab/chapter#> SELECT ?node ?label ?description WHERE { ?node skos:inScheme ch:Abstractions ; rdfs:label ?label . OPTIONAL { ?node dcterms:description ?description } } ORDER BY ?label

challenges.label: Real-life challenges
challenges.description: What breaks when ZK meets the world.
challenges.query: PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX ch: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/zk-lab/vocab/chapter#> SELECT ?node ?label ?description WHERE { ?node skos:inScheme ch:Challenges ; rdfs:label ?label . OPTIONAL { ?node dcterms:description ?description } } ORDER BY ?label

mitigations.label: What mitigates what
mitigations.description: Cross-cutting view of which concepts mitigate which challenges.
mitigations.query: PREFIX zkp: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/zk-lab/vocab/zkp#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?mitigator ?mitigatorLabel ?challenge ?challengeLabel WHERE { ?mitigator zkp:mitigates ?challenge . ?mitigator rdfs:label ?mitigatorLabel . ?challenge rdfs:label ?challengeLabel }

crossChapter.label: Cross-chapter relationships
crossChapter.description: Edges whose endpoints sit in different chapters.
crossChapter.query: PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> SELECT ?s ?p ?o ?schemeS ?schemeO WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . ?s skos:inScheme ?schemeS . ?o skos:inScheme ?schemeO . FILTER(?schemeS != ?schemeO) }
